items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to rate limiting on public pages. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces that confirm the expected outcome of this scenario. The lack of direct evidence or API interactions related to rate limiting leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
